---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for LaraCoreKit
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternative Solutions

Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Module Scope

- [ ] Core framework
- [ ] Existing module (specify which): ___________
- [ ] New module
- [ ] Addon module (external)

## Implementation Details

If you have ideas about implementation, share them here.

## Benefits

How will this benefit LaraCoreKit users?

## Breaking Changes

Will this require breaking changes?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Not sure

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request.

## Related Issues

Link to related issues or discussions if any.

## Willingness to Contribute

Are you willing to work on this feature?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I need help implementing this
